title: PracticeBotPvP
body:
** рҹӨ– PracticeBotPlus - Complete Plugin Overview

 рҹ“Ӣ Executive Summary

**PracticeBotPlus** is a cutting-edge PvP practice plugin for Minecraft Paper/Spigot servers (1.21.1-1.21.4) that spawns intelligent AI zombies to help players improve their combat skills. Unlike basic target dummies, PracticeBotPlus implements authentic Minecraft combat mechanics including critical hits, sprint combos, W-tapping, and player-like movement patternsвҖ”all controlled by a sophisticated difficulty system ranging from beginner-friendly to frame-perfect execution.

 At a Glance
- **Type**: PvP Practice / Combat Training
- **Platform**: Paper 1.21.1 - 1.21.11
- **Java Version**: 21+
- **Dependencies**: None (optional: PlaceholderAPI, Vault, WorldGuard)
- **License**: All  Rights Reserved
- **Performance**: ~5MB per bot, minimal server impact

---

 рҹҺҜ What is PracticeBotPlus?

 The Problem It Solves

Most Minecraft PvP servers face common challenges:
- Players need practice partners but may not have opponents available
- New players struggle to learn combat mechanics
- Skilled players want consistent training without human variability
- Practice arenas require other players to be online
- Target dummies don't simulate real combat behavior

 The Solution

PracticeBotPlus creates **intelligent AI practice partners** that:
- вң… Simulate real player combat behavior
- вң… Scale from beginner to expert difficulty
- вң… Work 24/7 without needing other players
- вң… Provide consistent, repeatable practice
- вң… Teach proper PvP techniques through authentic mechanics
- вң… Adapt to each player's skill level and preferences

---

 вңЁ Core Features

 рҹҺ® 1. Authentic Combat Mechanics

 True Vanilla Critical Hits
```
How It Works:
1. Bot detects crit opportunity (based on difficulty)
2. Bot jumps (Y velocity = 0.42, same as player)
3. Bot waits ~7 ticks to reach falling state
4. Bot attacks while falling = TRUE CRITICAL HIT
5. 1.5x damage multiplier applied (vanilla formula)
```

**Validates ALL 8 vanilla conditions:**
- вң… Entity must be falling (negative Y velocity)
- вң… Fall distance > 0
- вң… Not on ground
- вң… Not in water
- вң… Not climbing ladder/vine
- вң… No blindness effect
- вң… Not in vehicle
- вң… No levitation/slow falling effects

 Sprint Combo System (W-Tapping)
```
Tick-Perfect Sequence:
Tick 0:  Start sprint
Tick 0:  Attack target (with sprint knockback bonus)
Tick 1:  Stop sprint (W-tap reset)
Tick 3:  Ready for next attack
```

**Benefits:**
- Teaches proper W-tap timing
- Realistic knockback mechanics
- Sprint reset for consecutive combos
- Difficulty-based accuracy (10% to 100%)

---

 рҹ§  2. Intelligent AI System

 State-Based Behavior Machine
```
AI States:
IDLE       вҶ’ Bot waiting for engagement
ENGAGING   вҶ’ Moving to optimal range
ATTACKING  вҶ’ Executing attack sequence
JUMPING    вҶ’ Mid-air for critical hit
FALLING    вҶ’ Crit window active
DODGING    вҶ’ Evasive maneuvers (low health)
STRAFING   вҶ’ Circling target
```

 Movement Patterns

**Circle Strafing:**
```
Behavior:
вҖў Maintains 3-3.5 block distance
вҖў Circles clockwise/counterclockwise
вҖў Adjusts radius dynamically
вҖў Frequency: 30% (Easy) to 100% (Hacker)
```

**Zigzag Strafing:**
```
Behavior:
вҖў Moves left-right-left pattern
вҖў Random direction changes
вҖў Keeps player in front
вҖў Unpredictable timing
```

**Natural Movement:**
```
Behavior:
вҖў Random jumps every 20-60 ticks
вҖў Sprint when chasing (>4 blocks)
вҖў Walk in optimal range
вҖў Back up when too close (<2 blocks)
вҖў Evasive dodging at low health
```

---

 рҹҺҡпёҸ 3. Difficulty System (The Accuracy Engine)

 How It Works
Each difficulty level controls **accuracy percentages** for every bot action:

| Difficulty | Crit % | Combo % | Strafe % | Reaction Speed | Description |
|------------|--------|---------|----------|----------------|-------------|
| **EASY** | 10% | 10% | 30% | 1.5x slower | Rarely uses advanced techniques. Perfect for beginners learning basic mechanics. |
| **MEDIUM** | 40% | 50% | 60% | Normal | Balanced difficulty. Uses techniques half the time. Good for intermediate practice. |
| **HARD** | 80% | 90% | 85% | 2x faster | Highly skilled. Almost always optimal. Challenges experienced players. |
| **HACKER** | 100% | 100% | 100% | 3x faster | Frame-perfect execution. Always crits, always combos. For masochists. |

 Difficulty Impact Examples

**Easy Bot:**
```
Combat Pattern (10 attacks):
вҖў 1 critical hit (10%)
вҖў 1 sprint combo (10%)
вҖў 8 basic attacks
вҖў Slow reactions (1.5x delay)
вҖў Minimal strafing (30% of time)
Result: Predictable, forgiving practice
```

**Hacker Bot:**
```
Combat Pattern (10 attacks):
вҖў 10 critical hits (100%)
вҖў 10 sprint combos (100%)
вҖў 0 basic attacks (all optimized)
вҖў Instant reactions (0.3x delay)
вҖў Constant strafing (100% of time)
Result: Brutal, unforgiving training
```

---

 рҹ‘• 4. Equipment System

 Loadout Presets (7 Built-In)

**Leather Set:**
```yaml
Armor: Leather (full set)
Weapon: Stone Sword
Shield: Yes
Defense: Low
Best For: Early game practice
```

**Iron Set (Default):**
```yaml
Armor: Iron (full set)
Weapon: Iron Sword
Shield: Yes
Defense: Medium
Best For: Balanced practice
```

**Diamond Set:**
```yaml
Armor: Diamond (full set)
  - Protection II on all pieces
Weapon: Diamond Sword
  - Sharpness II
Shield: Yes
Defense: High
Best For: Advanced practice
```

**Netherite Set:**
```yaml
Armor: Netherite (full set)
  - Protection IV on all pieces
  - Unbreaking III
Weapon: Netherite Sword
  - Sharpness V
Shield: Yes
Defense: Maximum
Best For: Endgame practice
```

**Tank Set:**
```yaml
Armor: Netherite (full set)
  - Protection IV + Unbreaking III
Weapon: Netherite Axe
  - Sharpness V
Shield: No (offensive focus)
Special: Maximum defense
```

**Naked Set:**
```yaml
Armor: None
Weapon: Iron Sword
Shield: No
Defense: Zero
Best For: Practicing combos/crits without defense
```

**Custom:**
```yaml
Mix and match any items through GUI
Save your own combinations
Full enchantment support
```

---

 рҹ–ҘпёҸ 5. User Interface

 Settings GUI (Interactive Inventory)
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ           В§6В§lBot Settings                 в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [в—Җ]  В§6Difficulty: В§eMedium  [в–¶]         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ       В§7Crit: 40% вҖў Combo: 50%             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [в–ј]  В§6Reach: В§f3.5 blocks  [в–І]          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ       В§7Range: 3.0 - 6.0 blocks            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [в–ј]  В§6Health: В§c20 HP  [в–І]              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ       В§7(10 hearts)                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ       [В§6В§lEdit Loadout]                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ              [В§cВ§lClose]                  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**Features:**
- вң… Real-time setting changes
- вң… Visual feedback with lore
- вң… Instant bot updates
- вң… Click-based controls
- вң… Color-coded values

 Loadout GUI
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ         В§6В§lBot Loadout Editor             в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [Helmet]        [Weapon]                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [Chestplate]    [Shield]                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [Leggings]                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [Boots]                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  В§ePresets:                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [Leather] [Iron] [Diamond] [Netherite]    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [Tank] [Naked] [Custom]                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [В§aВ§lSave] [В§6В§lReset] [В§cВ§lBack]        в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**Features:**
- вң… Visual equipment preview
- вң… One-click presets
- вң… Custom combinations
- вң… Instant application
- вң… Enchantment support

---

 рҹ’ҫ 6. Data Persistence

 Player Data Storage (JSON)
```json
{
  "playerId": "069a79f4-44e9-4726-a5be-fca90e38aaf5",
  "difficulty": "HARD",
  "reach": 4.5,
  "health": 40.0,
  "autoSpawn": false,
  "loadout": {
    "helmet": { "type": "DIAMOND_HELMET", ... },
    "weapon": { "type": "DIAMOND_SWORD", ... }
  },
  "statistics": {
    "totalSpawns": 15,
    "totalKills": 3,
    "totalDeaths": 2,
    "damageDealt": 450,
    "damageTaken": 230
  }
}
```

**Features:**
- вң… Per-player settings
- вң… Automatic saving (every 5 minutes)
- вң… Save on logout
- вң… Human-readable JSON
- вң… Statistics tracking
- вң… Full ItemStack serialization

---

 рҹ”Ң 7. Integrations & Hooks

 PlaceholderAPI (15+ Placeholders)
```
Available Placeholders:
%practicebot_has_bot%           вҶ’ true/false
%practicebot_difficulty%        вҶ’ Easy/Medium/Hard/Hacker
%practicebot_difficulty_color%  вҶ’ В§aEasy (colored)
%practicebot_reach%             вҶ’ 3.5
%practicebot_health%            вҶ’ 40
%practicebot_hearts%            вҶ’ 20
%practicebot_bot_health%        вҶ’ 32.5
%practicebot_bot_health_max%    вҶ’ 40.0
%practicebot_bot_state%         вҶ’ Engaging/Attacking/etc.
%practicebot_total_spawns%      вҶ’ 15
%practicebot_total_kills%       вҶ’ 3
%practicebot_total_deaths%      вҶ’ 2
%practicebot_damage_dealt%      вҶ’ 450
%practicebot_damage_taken%      вҶ’ 230
%practicebot_auto_spawn%        вҶ’ true/false
```

**Use Cases:**
- Tab list displays
- Scoreboards
- Chat formats
- GUI menus
- Holograms

 WorldGuard Integration
```
Features:
вң“ Custom flag: practicebot-spawn
вң“ Region-based spawn control
вң“ Build permission checks
вң“ PvP zone detection
вң“ Automatic region queries

Commands:
/region flag arena practicebot-spawn allow
/region flag lobby practicebot-spawn deny
/region flag pvp practicebot-spawn -g nonmembers deny
```

 Vault Support
```
Features:
вң“ Permission system integration
вң“ Group-based restrictions
вң“ Primary group detection
вң“ Multi-group support

Example:
VIP players get Hacker difficulty
Default players limited to Hard
```

---

 рҹҺ® 8. Command System

 Complete Command List

**Basic Commands:**
```
/bot spawn                    - Spawn your practice bot
/bot remove                   - Remove your bot
/bot respawn                  - Respawn with current settings
/bot tp                       - Teleport bot to you
/bot info                     - View detailed bot information
/bot gui                      - Opens bot settings gui
/bot help [page]              - Paginated help menu
```

**Configuration Commands:**
```
/bot difficulty <level>       - Set difficulty (easy/medium/hard/hacker)
/bot reach <3.0-6.0>         - Set attack reach in blocks
/bot health <20-100>         - Set max health (10-50 hearts)
/bot loadout [preset]        - Open loadout GUI or apply preset
```

**Command Aliases:**
```
/bot = /practicebot = /pbot = /pvpbot

Subcommand Aliases:
spawn     вҶ’ create, summon
remove    вҶ’ delete, despawn, dismiss
teleport  вҶ’ tp, summon, bring
respawn   вҶ’ reset, restart, reload
settings  вҶ’ config, configure, menu
loadout   вҶ’ equipment, gear, armor
difficulty вҶ’ diff, level
reach     вҶ’ range, distance
health    вҶ’ hp, hearts
info      вҶ’ status, stats
help      вҶ’ ?, commands
```

**Tab Completion:**
```
/bot <TAB>                    вҶ’ spawn, remove, settings, difficulty...
/bot diff<TAB>                вҶ’ difficulty
/bot difficulty <TAB>         вҶ’ easy, medium, hard, hacker
/bot loadout <TAB>            вҶ’ leather, iron, diamond, netherite...
/bot reach <TAB>              вҶ’ 3.0, 3.5, 4.0, 4.5, 5.0, 5.5, 6.0
/bot health <TAB>             вҶ’ 20, 40, 60, 80, 100
```

---

 рҹҺҜ Use Cases

 1. **PvP Practice Servers**
```
Scenario: Kit PvP Warm-Up Area
Implementation:
вҖў Place bot spawners in warm-up arena
вҖў Set difficulty to match player rank
вҖў Auto-spawn on arena entry
вҖў Remove on arena exit

Benefits:
вң“ Players can warm up without queue
вң“ Practice specific techniques
вң“ Test new loadouts
```

 2. **Training Schools**
```
Scenario: PvP Academy
Implementation:
вҖў Lesson 1: Easy bot (crits only)
вҖў Lesson 2: Medium bot (combos)
вҖў Lesson 3: Hard bot (shields)
вҖў Lesson 4: Hacker bot (full test)

Benefits:
вң“ Progressive difficulty curve
вң“ Consistent training partners
вң“ Measurable improvement
```

 3. **Content Creation**
```
Scenario: YouTube Tutorials
Implementation:
вҖў Spawn bot at exact difficulty
вҖў Demonstrate techniques clearly
вҖў Reproducible results
вҖў No need for co-host

Benefits:
вң“ Reliable demonstration partner
вң“ Can retry unlimited times
вң“ Customizable difficulty for video
```

 4. **Server Minigames**
```
Scenario: PvE Challenge Arenas
Implementation:
вҖў Waves of increasing difficulty
вҖў Timed survival challenges
вҖў Boss battle simulation
вҖў Leaderboard integration

Benefits:
вң“ Solo playable content
вң“ Skill-based progression
вң“ Consistent challenge
```

 5. **Personal Practice**
```
Scenario: Solo Player Improvement
Implementation:
вҖў Practice during off-hours
вҖў Focus on specific weaknesses
вҖў Track statistics over time
вҖў No pressure from others

Benefits:
вң“ Available 24/7
вң“ Private practice
вң“ Self-paced learning
```

---

 рҹ‘Ҙ Target Audience

 рҹҺ® Players

 Beginners (Easy Difficulty)
```
Profile: New to PvP
Needs:
вҖў Learn basic attack timing
вҖў Understand critical hits
вҖў Practice weapon switching
вҖў Build confidence

PracticeBotPlus Helps:
вң“ Forgiving AI that rarely uses advanced techniques
вң“ Predictable patterns to learn from
вң“ Safe environment without judgment
вң“ Gradual difficulty increase
```

 Intermediate (Medium/Hard Difficulty)
```
Profile: Knows basics, wants to improve
Needs:
вҖў Master combo timing
вҖў Practice W-tapping
вҖў Increase consistency

PracticeBotPlus Helps:
вң“ Realistic combat simulation
вң“ Variety in bot behavior
вң“ Challenges without frustration
вң“ Skill refinement
```

 Advanced (Hard/Hacker Difficulty)
```
Profile: Skilled players seeking perfection
Needs:
вҖў Frame-perfect practice
вҖў Consistency training
вҖў Technique refinement
вҖў Competitive edge

PracticeBotPlus Helps:
вң“ Frame-perfect bot execution
вң“ Unforgiving difficulty
вң“ Identify weaknesses
вң“ Peak performance training
```

 рҹҸў Server Owners

 Small Servers (10-50 players)
```
Challenge: Not always opponents online
Solution: Always-available practice partners
Benefits:
вҖў Players stay engaged during low-pop hours
вҖў New players can practice without veterans
вҖў Reduce skill gap between players
```

 Medium Servers (50-200 players)
```
Challenge: Queue times for practice matches
Solution: Instant practice without waiting
Benefits:
вҖў Reduce queue pressure
вҖў Warm-up area before ranked
вҖў Solo practice option
```

 Large Servers (200+ players)
```
Challenge: Need scalable practice solutions
Solution: Per-player bots (not shared)
Benefits:
вҖў No arena/dummy conflicts
вҖў Personalized difficulty
вҖў Statistics tracking
```

 рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’» Developers

 Plugin Developers
```
Use Cases:
вҖў Integrate with custom PvP plugins
вҖў Add bot challenges to minigames
вҖў Create training systems
вҖў Build leaderboards

API Provides:
вң“ Full bot control
вң“ Event system
вң“ Custom behaviors
вң“ Difficulty providers
```

 Server Administrators
```
Use Cases:
вҖў Region-based bot restrictions
вҖў Rank-based difficulty limits
вҖў Integration with permissions
вҖў Custom bot presets

Features Provide:
вң“ WorldGuard integration
вң“ Vault support
вң“ Extensive configuration
вң“ Per-player settings
```

---

 рҹ”Ҙ Key Benefits

 For Players
1. **Available 24/7** - Practice anytime, no need for opponents
2. **Skill Progression** - 4 difficulty levels grow with you
3. **Private Practice** - No pressure, practice mistakes privately
4. **Consistent Training** - Same bot behavior every time
5. **Learn Mechanics** - Authentic combat teaches proper techniques
6. **Customizable** - Adjust every aspect to your preferences
7. **Statistics** - Track improvement over time
8. **Free Practice** - No cost, unlimited usage

 For Server Owners
1. **Increase Engagement** - Players stay during low-population hours
2. **Reduce Skill Gap** - New players can practice without veterans
3. **No Additional Resources** - Minimal performance impact (~5MB/bot)
4. **Easy Setup** - Install and go, works out of box
5. **Fully Customizable** - Configure to match server style
6. **Integration Ready** - Works with PlaceholderAPI, Vault, WorldGuard
7. **Developer Friendly** - API for custom implementations
8. **Support Ready** - Comprehensive documentation


---

 вҡҷпёҸ Technical Highlights

 Performance
```
Optimization Features:
вң“ Lightweight AI (single tick loop per bot)
вң“ Optimized pathfinding (20 block max range)
вң“ Cached player data in memory
вң“ Async data I/O operations
вң“ Minimal entity count (1 zombie per player max)
вң“ No database required (JSON files)
вң“ Event-driven architecture
вң“ Smart cleanup on player disconnect

Benchmarks:
вҖў 1 bot = ~5MB RAM
вҖў 20 bots = ~100MB RAM
вҖў CPU impact: <1% on modern hardware
вҖў TPS impact: Negligible with <50 bots
```

Plugin Compatibility:
вң“ PlaceholderAPI (optional)
вң“ Vault (optional)
вң“ WorldGuard (optional)
вң“ Citizens (no conflicts)
вң“ MythicMobs (no conflicts)
вң“ Custom plugins (via API)
```

---

 рҹ“Ҡ Comparison with Alternatives

| Feature | PracticeBotPlus | Target Dummies | NPC Plugins | Combat Bots (Basic) |
|---------|-----------------|----------------|-------------|---------------------|
| **True Critical Hits** | вң… Authentic | вқҢ Fake/None | вқҢ Scripted | вҡ пёҸ Sometimes |
| **Sprint Combos/W-Tap** | вң… Real mechanics | вқҢ No | вқҢ No | вқҢ No |
| **Player-Like Movement** | вң… Strafe/jump/dodge | вқҢ Stationary | вҡ пёҸ Basic walk | вҡ пёҸ Simple |
| **Difficulty Scaling** | вң… 4 levels, accuracy-based | вқҢ Fixed | вҡ пёҸ HP only | вҡ пёҸ Speed only |
| **Customization** | вң… Extensive (GUI) | вҡ пёҸ Limited | вң… Good | вҡ пёҸ Some |
| **Performance** | вң… Optimized | вң… Minimal | вҡ пёҸ Heavy | вң… Good |
| **No Dependencies** | вң… Pure Paper API | вң… Yes | вқҢ Often needs NMS | вң… Usually |
| **Statistics Tracking** | вң… Full | вқҢ No | вҡ пёҸ Sometimes | вқҢ No |

---

 рҹҺ“ Learning & Education

 What Players Learn

**Combat Fundamentals:**
- вң… Attack timing and cooldowns
- вң… Critical hit mechanics and timing
- вң… Sprint knockback (combos)
- вң… W-tapping technique
- вң… Distance management
- вң… Strafe patterns

**Advanced Techniques:**
- вң… Crit chaining
- вң… Combo consistency
- вң… Shield baiting
- вң… Repositioning during combat
- вң… Damage trading
- вң… Knockback control

**Skill Progression Path:**
```
EASY (Week 1-2):
Learn: Basic attacks, movement, critical hits
Goal: Understand combat fundamentals

MEDIUM (Week 3-4):
Learn: Combos, strafing
Goal: Develop consistency

HARD (Week 5-8):
Learn: Advanced techniques, reaction timing
Goal: Refine execution

HACKER (Week 9+):
Learn: Frame-perfect timing, adaptability
Goal: Master combat mechanics
```

---

 рҹҡҖ Getting Started (Quick Guide)

 For Players
```
Step 1: Join server with PracticeBotPlus
Step 2: Run /bot spawn
Step 3: Run /bot difficulty easy (for beginners)
Step 4: Practice basic attacks
Step 5: Run /bot gui to customize settings
Step 6: Gradually increase difficulty as you improve
```

 For Server Owners
```
Step 1: Download PracticeBotPlus-1.0.0.jar
Step 2: Place in plugins/ folder
Step 3: Restart server
Step 4: (Optional) Edit config.yml
Step 5: (Optional) Configure permissions
